textByHashes.982ef11a3c58a308cf86f0f7653d3c1c9274f71a: You look hungry to me. I tell you what - have a on me.
textByHashes.96ff804c76ca6dae0783c2048c6443275c72f346: Hey, I didn't say you could have that!
textByHashes.49cba8c74abfeb677248fbdb40ab07023d222201: I'd best be going - lots more sandwiches to deliver!
textByHashes.2087c780a7147e553740c3b90e619f1349835e92: You think I made these just for fun?!!?
textByHashes.7a22644d44860cba74fa8f7b0fde08c30a6dbd0b: Come on , I made these specially!!
textByHashes.ef03ba0e9d93f01adced133cdffb91e67fe3ec34: What do ya want for tea? And it better not be a baguette!
textByHashes.ec7b450d1fd44c2f6dcd1d6e9bd05c7756244f3d: Why won't people talk to me?
